prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年西南大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别约为 43754、43085、48315、61891、58182 名。2021–2022 年基本持平，2023 年明显后移至 48315 名，2024 年大幅后移至 61891 名，2025 年小幅回升至 58182 名。近 3 年整体呈后移趋势，2025 年较 2024 年略有回弹，但较 2021 年已累计后移约 14428 名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021 年 150 人、2022 年 134 人、2023 年 133 人、2024 年 138 人、2025 年 155 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 194 人，较 2025 年扩招约 25.2%，显著增加招生名额，对竞争压力有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南大学为教育部直属 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳步上升，2026 年位列第 61 名，属于全国百强中上游水平，综合实力较强；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园外卖配送管理争议，但属校园生活管理层面，对报考决策影响有限；抖音热度排名第 38 位（较热），短视频平台有一定关注度；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，心理学获评 A、教育学获评 A、马克思主义理论获评 A-，均为该校王牌学科，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年山东省考生总数约 72 万人，较 2025 年约 68.1 万人增加约 5.7%，考生规模持续扩大，整体竞争加剧；省控线（普通类一段）近年稳定在 441–444 分区间，2025 年为 441 分，波动不大；西南大学位于重庆市，对山东考生属跨省报考，无显著地域偏好加成；该校在山东招生规模较大（2026 年计划 194 人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招约 25.2% 对竞争的缓解作用、以及山东省考生规模增长约 5.7% 带来的竞争加剧，扩招效应大于考生增长效应，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年继续后移（更易进）。预测最低位次约 66464 名，区间 65964–66964 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 计算机科学与技术
- 中国语言文学类（汉语言文学、汉语国际教育）
- 应用心理学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程）
- 人工智能
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、统计学）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学）
- 教育学（晏阳初创新实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 食品科学与工程类（食品科学与工程、食品质量与安全）
- 机械类（机械设计制造及其自动化、智能车辆工程、智能制造工程）
- 植物生产类（农学、园艺、植物保护）
- 动物医学类（荣昌校区）
- 水产类（荣昌校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 66464 名，区间 65964–66964 名。建议位次在区间内的考生以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可冲刺（需位次明显优于预测值），三档专业作为保底。一档中应用心理学（心理学 A）和法学为该校优势与热门专业，竞争最为激烈；二档中教育学（教育学 A）为西南大学王牌，性价比高；三档荣昌校区专业录取位次相对靠后，适合位次接近区间上限的考生稳妥报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southwest University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 43754, 43085, 48315, 61891, and 58182 respectively. The rankings were basically stable from 2021 to 2022, then significantly dropped to 48315 in 2023, further dropped to 61891 in 2024, and slightly rebounded to 58182 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the overall trend has been a decline, with 2025 showing a slight rebound compared to 2024, but a cumulative decline of about 14428 places since 2021. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong for comprehensive category: 150 in 2021, 134 in 2022, 133 in 2023, 138 in 2024, 155 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 194, an expansion of about 25.2% compared to 2025, which will alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen in recent years, reaching 61st in 2026, placing it in the upper-middle tier of the national top 100, with strong comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving campus food delivery management disputes, but these are campus life management issues with limited impact on application decisions. It ranks 38th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), indicating some attention on short video platforms. No significant enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Psychology received an A, Education received an A, and Marxist Theory received an A-, all of which are the university's flagship disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of examinees in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from approximately 681,000 in 2025, with the examinee scale continuing to expand, intensifying overall competition. The provincial control line (regular class first segment) has been stable in the 441–444 score range in recent years, with 2025 at 441, showing little fluctuation. Southwest University is located in Chongqing, which is an inter-provincial application for Shandong examinees, with no significant regional preference advantage. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shandong (194 planned for 2026), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical declining trend in rankings, the significant 25.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 which alleviates competition, and the 5.7% increase in Shandong examinee numbers which intensifies competition, the expansion effect outweighs the examinee growth effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to decline (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 66464, with a range of 65964–66964.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Computer Science and Technology
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education)
- Applied Psychology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting)
- Education (Yan Yangchu Innovation Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Food Science and Engineering (Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering)
- Plant Production (Agronomy, Horticulture, Plant Protection)
- Veterinary Medicine (Rongchang Campus)
- Aquaculture (Rongchang Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 66464, range 65964–66964. It is recommended that examinees within this range prioritize Tier 2 majors as their main choices, Tier 1 majors can be attempted (requiring significantly better rankings than the prediction), and Tier 3 majors serve as safety options. Among Tier 1, Applied Psychology (Psychology A) and Law are the university's advantageous and popular majors, with the most intense competition. Among Tier 2, Education (Education A) is a flagship major of Southwest University, offering high cost-performance. Tier 3 majors at the Rongchang Campus have relatively lower admission rankings, suitable for examinees near the upper limit of the range for stable application.
